creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Murilo and Jin-Sih,

I am very sorry but I did not commit your patch fast enough and now
version 1.54 of p5-Mojolicious is not fetchable anymore :(
Would it be possible that you send an updated patch corresponding to
the latest version of Mojolicious please?

I will commit it as soon as possible this time!

Sorry again and thanks for your work.

Frederic (culot@)
